headline: Rothschild & Co Redburn Upgrades McDonald’s (MCD), Morgan Stanley Trims PT
summary: McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) is included among the 10 Best Food Stocks with Highest Dividends. On April 23, Rothschild & Co Redburn upgraded McDonald’s Corporation (NYSE:MCD) to Neutral from Sell and raised its price target to $306 from $260.The firm says McDonald’s has executed its most comprehensive value reset since the Dollar Menu era. headline: McDonald’s US CIO to depart, successor named
summary: Mustafa Husain, former VP of restaurant technology engineering, will replace Valerie Ashbaugh starting May 1.
